name: PutItemInput
description: PutItemInput schema from Amazon DynamoDB API

TableName.description: The name of the table to contain the item

Item.description: A map of attribute name to attribute values, representing the item

ConditionExpression.description: A condition that must be satisfied for a put to succeed

ExpressionAttributeNames.description: Substitution tokens for attribute names in an expression

ExpressionAttributeValues.description: Values that can be substituted in an expression

ReturnValues.description: Determines the return values after the operation
